bird.name: White-tailed nightjar
bird.summary: The white-tailed nightjar (Hydropsalis cayennensis) is a species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is found in the tropic regions…

locations.name: ABC群島
locations.summary: ABC群島是阿魯巴（Aruba）、博奈尔（Bonaire）和库拉索（Curaçao）三個島的簡稱，它們為加勒比地区背风安的列斯群岛中位於最西面的三個島嶼。從西至東，島嶼的排列順序分別為：阿魯巴、库拉索和博奈尔。 這三個島皆為荷兰王国的一部…

relations.subject: White-tailed nightjar
relations.evidence: It is found in the "ABC Islands", Brazil, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Martinique, Panama, Suriname, Trinidad and Tobago and Venezuela

relations.subject: White-tailed nightjar
relations.evidence: No specific threats have been identified except on Martinique, where habitat destruction and introduced predators are cause for concern
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: White-tailed nightjar
relations.evidence: No specific threats have been identified except on Martinique, where habitat destruction and introduced predators are cause for concern
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
